summary: Iteration 14: Checkout Page Redesign - All 10 features tested and PASSED. Express Checkout with Apple Pay at top, compact radio payment methods list with 'Populair' badge on iDEAL, gift wrapping checkbox replaces comments field and adds €3 to total, sticky payment bar on mobile only.
critical_code_review_comments: CheckoutPage.jsx correctly implements Express Checkout section at top (lines 306-334) with Apple Pay button and 'of vul je gegevens in' divider
Payment methods shown as compact radio list (lines 450-503) with iDEAL selected by default and 'Populair' badge
Gift wrap checkbox (lines 423-448) replaces opmerkingen field with proper pricing integration (+€3.00)
Sticky mobile payment bar (lines 721-739) uses lg:hidden class to only show on mobile viewports
Total calculation correctly includes gift wrap price (line 673): getTotal() + GIFT_WRAP_PRICE when giftWrap is checked
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: None - tested with product added to cart from homepage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Checkout page redesign fully functional. To test checkout: go to homepage -> click 'In Winkelwagen' on any product -> click 'Afrekenen' in cart sidebar. Cart state is React context, direct navigation to /checkout shows empty cart. Mobile sticky bar only visible on viewport < 1024px (lg:hidden). Gift wrap checkbox adds €3.00 to total dynamically.

express_checkout_section.details: Express Checkout section at top with data-testid='express-checkout', Apple Pay button visible

divider_text.details: 'of vul je gegevens in' divider visible between Express Checkout and form fields

contactgegevens_section.details: Contactgegevens section with email field (data-testid='checkout-email') visible

verzendadres_fields.details: All shipping fields present: voornaam, achternaam, adres, postcode, plaats, telefoon (all with data-testid)

cadeauverpakking_checkbox.details: Cadeauverpakking checkbox visible with '+ EUR 3,00' text, toggles correctly

compact_radio_payment_methods.details: Payment methods shown as compact radio list with iDEAL selected by default and 'Populair' badge

no_opmerkingen_field.details: No comment/opmerkingen textarea field exists on page (count = 0)

besteloverzicht_sidebar.details: Right sidebar shows 'Besteloverzicht' with product, pricing, and 'Veilig betalen' button

mobile_sticky_bar.details: Sticky payment bar (data-testid='sticky-payment-bar') visible on mobile (390x844), hidden on desktop (1920x1080). Bar persists during scroll.

gift_wrap_adds_to_total.details: Selecting Cadeauverpakking checkbox updates total from €45,95 to €48,95 (+€3,00). Both sidebar button and sticky bar update dynamically.
